# Release Notes May 2026

## API rate limit update
Starting June 15, 2026, enterprise tenants can request a rate limit increase from 600 to 1200 requests per minute. The default limit remains 600 requests per minute unless an increase is approved.

## MFA recovery workflow
The MFA recovery workflow now requires identity verification for users who cannot access their primary email.

## Deprecated browser notice
The application now displays a warning banner for unsupported browsers before login.
